name: The Ashfields
description: Burned farmland three hours east of the gates. Something moved back in after the survivors left.

discoveryTable.label: A burned ledger page. Pre-Breach accounting records.

narrativeHook: The ash still smells of something that wasn't wood.

name: The Ruined Garrison
description: A military outpost from before the Breach. Four days north. Previous expeditions have not returned complete.

discoveryTable.label: Standing orders from before the Breach. Someone powerful issued them.

narrativeHook: The garrison flag is still flying. No one put it there recently.

name: The Green Corridor
description: A stretch of road south that still has trees. Two days. Relatively safe, relatively profitable.
narrativeHook: The traders used to call it the safe road. They don't anymore.
